title: Thoughts on 1/24/2023 — gun-feel, dream confusion, distance from family
html:
Yahir's first 2023 stream-of-consciousness journal — restarting the practice after a long pause. Written rapidly, typos preserved. Three threads collide: holding a BB gun on a movie set with lhiam and finding the sensation eerily natural, a sexually confusing dream involving owen and ayden, and a creeping awareness that the "lone wolf" identity is letting his family become an afterthought.

TL;DR

  • First entry of the sexuality confusion arc — the owen/ayden dream cluster that recurs through Jan and Feb 2023.
  • Cites his dad's frame: "the person you should fear and be careful of is yourself, one mistake and it's over" — frames the gun moment as bottle-explosion pressure, not diamond-pressure.
  • Names a "ChatGPT idea" he wants to seize — pre-PHIB, pre-internship — first hint of the ai side project itch that kept resurfacing.
  • Self-aware that the lone-wolf adaptation is making siblings + mom an afterthought; commits to recommitting to family.
  • Voice: raw, typo-laden, late-night — the antithesis of the polished scholarship register he's writing in parallel.

sexuality confusion arc · owen · ayden · lhiam · yahir dad addiction arc · lone wolf tension · ai side project itch · journal practice
